text: Welcome to the team, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for joining our community!
Welcome aboard, @guide_sam! You're now an event helper. Excited to have you with us!
Welcome, @mentor_lina! Thank you for volunteering as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable!
Hey @newbie_kim, welcome to the community! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to introduce yourself!
